What works — signal miningMin group size 5 · Ranked by mean save rate
Every content dimension (format, hook, theme, caption length, hour, day, product) bucketed and compared on save rate — the truest long-term signal. Lift shows how much better/worse than the account-wide mean.

Ad-safe repurpose candidatescompliance score ≥ 80 · elite/strong save rate
Elite-performing organic posts that pass a first-pass Meta compliance scan. These are your highest-leverage candidates to repurpose as paid creative on BM1/BM3. Still requires human review before ad submission.
Compliance flags
Sort by
Posts with banned-vocab or soft-flag hits in caption. Hard flags disqualify from paid repurpose without rewrite. Soft flags are context-dependent (e.g. "pipe" is fine as product but not as verb).
